name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature for OmniVoice AI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]

body:
  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Feature Description
      description: Describe the feature

  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Business Value
      description: Why is this useful for e-commerce voice automation?

  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Proposed Implementation

  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Alternatives Considered
